description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a distinctive double-cutaway design, featuring a vibrant red body and a contrasting light-colored neck and headstock. The front of the guitar displays metallic hardware, including a bridge, pickups, and control knobs, all set against the red body. The neck is long and slender, with visible frets and tuning pegs arranged in a single row on the headstock. The back of the guitar is plain, showing only the red body and the light neck without any visible hardware. The body appears to be made of wood with a glossy finish, while the hardware is metallic. This guitar is typical of those used in urban music scenes, suitable for street performances or garage bands.
description: A red, double-cutaway electric guitar with metallic hardware, a light-colored neck, and a single-row headstock. The front features pickups and controls, while the back is plain.
description_view_0: The back view shows the red guitar body and light neck with no visible hardware or strings.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the guitar's thin profile and the protruding hardware on the front.
description_view_2: The front view displays the metallic bridge, pickups, control knobs, and the full string layout.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the slim profile and hardware depth.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with single-row tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a simple contour
